titleStmt.title: SII 29.108: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 108. (A.R. No. B. 567 of 1961-62.) KALLŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the compound of the Māraṭēśvara temple. [First Face].

It records a grant of income occurring from various taxes such as hejjuṅka, bilkoḍe, baṇnaya and vaḍḍarāvuḷa for the worship, offerings and perpetual lamp to the god Māraṭēśvara. The grant was made by heggaḍe Mallidēvarasa and Kopparasa on behalf of daṇḍanāyaka pasāyita surigi Vēmṇnamarasa, the heggaḍe of Ayyaṇavāḍi and mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Būchidēvarasa.

The record speaks of the rule of Chālukya chakravarti, Rakkasagaṅga [Tailapa III] and is dated in the king's regnal year 1, Pramōdūta, Phālguṇa, amāvāsya, Monday, solar eclipse corresponding to 1151 A.D., March 19, Monday. There was no eclipse on that day. Solar eclipse occured on February 18, Sunday. But the tithi was Magha, Amāvāsye.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē
trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrī cāḷukya cakravarti rakkasagaṁgadē
va variṣada 1 neya pramōdūtha saṁvatsarada phālgu
ṇadamavāse sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa nimi
ttavāgi śrīmadayyaṇapāḍināḍa heggaḍe daṁḍanāya
kaṁ pasāyitaṁ surige veṁṇnamarasaruṁ svasti śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ būcidēvarasaruṁ biṭṭa darṁmmavāgi Avara
heggaḍe mallidēvarasanuṁ kopparasanuṁ tavage naḍa
va hejjuṁka bilkoḍe baṇnaya vaḍḍarāvuḷa Eṁtenisa
ṟaluṁ huṭṭuvarddhadalli hoṁge hānavaṁ śrīmatsarbba
namaśyadagrahāraṁ kallūra śrī māraṭēśvara dēvaraṁ
gabōgakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ biṭṭaru yī dharṁmmavaṁ prati
pāḷisuvaraśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ Alliyūroḍe
yaruṁ sakaḷa bhaktaruṁ pratipāḷisuvaru maṁgaḷamahāLetter va is written below the line.
śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
